sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7590" key="a)nasxetiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνα-σχετικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n7590.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enduring, patient,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
